name: Freeze Dried Strawberry
description: Crispy, naturally sweet strawberries retaining 97% nutrients.
long_description: Our premium freeze-dried strawberries are carefully selected at peak ripeness.
nutrition_highlights: ["Rich in Vitamin C","High in Antioxidants","Natural Fiber","Zero Added Sugar"]
how_to_use: Enjoy straight from the pack, add to cereals, smoothies, yogurt.

name: Freeze Dried Mango
description: Tropical Alphonso mango pieces, intensely flavorful.
long_description: Experience the king of fruits in its most convenient form.
nutrition_highlights: ["Rich in Vitamin A & C","Natural Beta-Carotene","Digestive Enzymes"]
how_to_use: Snack directly, blend into smoothies, add to trail mix.

name: Freeze Dried Kiwi
description: Tangy and refreshing kiwi slices with a delightful crunch.
long_description: Our freeze-dried kiwi slices retain the tangy-sweet flavor of fresh kiwis.
nutrition_highlights: ["2x Vitamin C vs Oranges","Rich in Vitamin K","Natural Enzymes"]
how_to_use: Eat as a snack, add to fruit salads, cereals.

name: Freeze Dried Blueberry
long_description: These tiny powerhouses are freeze-dried at peak freshness.
nutrition_highlights: ["Highest Antioxidants","Brain Health Support","Rich in Vitamin K"]
how_to_use: Add to oatmeal, yogurt, smoothie bowls, baking recipes.

name: Freeze Dried Dragon Fruit
description: Exotic pink dragon fruit with subtle sweetness.
long_description: Our freeze-dried dragon fruit captures the exotic beauty of this tropical superfruit.
nutrition_highlights: ["Rich in Prebiotics","Natural Iron Source","Vitamin C Boost"]
how_to_use: Snack directly, add to smoothie bowls for color.

name: Freeze Dried Pineapple
description: Sweet and tangy pineapple rings with tropical flavor.
long_description: Transport yourself to the tropics with our freeze-dried pineapple.
how_to_use: Enjoy as a snack, add to tropical trail mix.

name: Freeze Dried Jamun
description: Traditional Indian black plum with unique taste.
long_description: Rediscover the beloved Indian jamun in a modern form.
how_to_use: Eat directly as a snack, add to desserts.

name: Freeze Dried Beetroot
description: Vibrant ruby-red beetroot chips packed with nitrates.
long_description: Our freeze-dried beetroot retains its stunning deep ruby color.
how_to_use: Snack directly, add to salads, blend into smoothies.

name: Freeze Dried Broccoli
description: Nutrient-dense broccoli florets, perfect for soups.
long_description: Our freeze-dried broccoli florets preserve the nutritional profile.
how_to_use: Rehydrate with hot water for cooking, add to soups.

name: Freeze Dried Carrot
description: Sweet and crunchy carrot pieces rich in beta-carotene.
long_description: Our freeze-dried carrots capture the natural sweetness.
how_to_use: Snack directly, add to soups, stews, fried rice.

name: Freeze Dried Sweet Corn
description: Golden sweet corn kernels with natural buttery sweetness.
long_description: Our freeze-dried sweet corn kernels deliver satisfying pop.
how_to_use: Enjoy as a crunchy snack, add to salads, soups.

name: Freeze Dried Green Peas
description: Protein-rich green peas with satisfying crunch.
long_description: Our freeze-dried green peas are a protein-packed revolution.
how_to_use: Snack directly, add to trail mix, use in pulao.

name: Freeze Dried Chicken Biryani
description: Authentic Hyderabadi-style chicken biryani — just add hot water.
long_description: Experience the royal flavors of authentic Hyderabadi chicken biryani.
how_to_use: Add 150ml hot water, close and wait 5 minutes.

name: Freeze Dried Prawn Biryani
description: Coastal-style prawn biryani — ready in just 5 minutes.
long_description: Savor the coastal flavors of prawn biryani.
how_to_use: Add 150ml hot water, close and wait 5 minutes.

name: Freeze Dried Chole Bhatura
description: North Indian classic chole bhatura — ready in minutes.
long_description: Enjoy the beloved North Indian street food classic.
how_to_use: Add 120ml hot water, wait 5 minutes, stir well.

name: Freeze Dried Dal Makhni
description: Creamy, buttery dal makhni — comfort food made instant.
long_description: Our freeze-dried dal makhni captures the rich, creamy essence.
how_to_use: Add 120ml hot water, wait 5 minutes, stir well.

name: Freeze Dried Palak Paneer
description: Creamy spinach and cottage cheese curry.
long_description: Our freeze-dried palak paneer combines spinach with soft paneer.
how_to_use: Add 120ml hot water, wait 5 minutes, stir gently.

name: Freeze Dried Pav Bhaji
description: Mumbai iconic street food — spicy mixed vegetable curry.
long_description: Bring the taste of Mumbai streets to your table.
how_to_use: Add 100ml hot water, wait 5 minutes, stir well.
